'''鈭歜-l-b''' ('''kabalab''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:nanolens|nanolens]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-l-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nanolens|nanolens]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歜-l-b
|-
! Lemma
| kabalab
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibalab|thibalab]] || [[word:jibalab|jibalab]] || [[word:shibalab|shibalab]] || [[word:kibalab|kibalab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubalab|thuthubalab]] || [[word:jujubalab|jujubalab]] || [[word:shushubalab|shushubalab]] || [[word:kukubalab|kukubalab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubalab|thubalab]] || [[word:jubalab|jubalab]] || [[word:shubalab|shubalab]] || [[word:kubalab|kubalab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubalab|thubalab]] || [[word:jubalab|jubalab]] || [[word:shubalab|shubalab]] || [[word:kubalab|kubalab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thebalab|thebalab]] || [[word:jebalab|jebalab]] || [[word:shebalab|shebalab]] || [[word:kebalab|kebalab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobalab|thothobalab]] || [[word:jojobalab|jojobalab]] || [[word:shoshobalab|shoshobalab]] || [[word:kokobalab|kokobalab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobalab|thobalab]] || [[word:jobalab|jobalab]] || [[word:shobalab|shobalab]] || [[word:kobalab|kobalab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobalab|thobalab]] || [[word:jobalab|jobalab]] || [[word:shobalab|shobalab]] || [[word:kobalab|kobalab]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:balab|balab]] || [[word:balab|balab]] || [[word:balab|balab]] || [[word:balab|balab]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:balab|balab]] || [[word:balab|balab]] || [[word:balab|balab]] || [[word:balab|balab]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:balab|balab]] || [[word:balab|balab]] || [[word:balab|balab]] || [[word:balab|balab]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:balab|balab]] || [[word:balab|balab]] || [[word:balab|balab]] || [[word:balab|balab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙balab|th忙balab]] || [[word:j忙balab|j忙balab]] || [[word:sh忙balab|sh忙balab]] || [[word:k忙balab|k忙balab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathabalab|thathabalab]] || [[word:jajabalab|jajabalab]] || [[word:shashabalab|shashabalab]] || [[word:kakabalab|kakabalab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabalab|thabalab]] || [[word:jabalab|jabalab]] || [[word:shabalab|shabalab]] || [[word:kabalab|kabalab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabalab|thabalab]] || [[word:jabalab|jabalab]] || [[word:shabalab|shabalab]] || [[word:kabalab|kabalab]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shabalab|shabalab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshabalab|goshabalab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishabalab|gokishabalab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shabalabn眉|shabalabn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshabalabnkn眉|goshabalabnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishabalabn眉|gokishabalabn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shabalabsh毛|shabalabsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshabalabnksh毛|goshabalabnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishabalabsh毛|gokishabalabsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabalabro|shabalabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabalabnkro|goshabalabnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabalabro|gokishabalabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shabalabmu|shabalabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabalabnkmu|goshabalabnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabalabmu|gokishabalabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shabalabsher|shabalabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshabalabnksher|goshabalabnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishabalabsher|gokishabalabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shabalabng|shabalabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshabalabnkng|goshabalabnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishabalabng|gokishabalabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shabalabya|shabalabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshabalabnkya|goshabalabnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishabalabya|gokishabalabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shabalabyam|shabalabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshabalabnkyam|goshabalabnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishabalabyam|gokishabalabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabalabn眉sh毛|shabalabn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabalabnkn眉sh毛|goshabalabnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabalabn眉sh毛|gokishabalabn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabalabn眉ro|shabalabn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabalabnkn眉ro|goshabalabnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabalabn眉ro|gokishabalabn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabalabn眉mu|shabalabn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabalabnkn眉mu|goshabalabnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabalabn眉mu|gokishabalabn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabalabsh毛n眉|shabalabsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabalabnksh毛n眉|goshabalabnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabalabsh毛n眉|gokishabalabsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabalabsh毛ro|shabalabsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabalabnksh毛ro|goshabalabnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabalabsh毛ro|gokishabalabsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabalabsh毛mu|shabalabsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabalabnksh毛mu|goshabalabnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabalabsh毛mu|gokishabalabsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabalabron眉|shabalabron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabalabnkron眉|goshabalabnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabalabron眉|gokishabalabron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabalabrosh毛|shabalabrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabalabnkrosh毛|goshabalabnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabalabrosh毛|gokishabalabrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabalabromu|shabalabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabalabnkromu|goshabalabnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabalabromu|gokishabalabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabalabmun眉|shabalabmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabalabnkmun眉|goshabalabnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabalabmun眉|gokishabalabmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabalabmush毛|shabalabmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabalabnkmush毛|goshabalabnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabalabmush毛|gokishabalabmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabalabmuro|shabalabmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabalabnkmuro|goshabalabnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabalabmuro|gokishabalabmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
